message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Support OpenTofu (epic) mission (#928)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-3741-support-opentofu-epic",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Support OpenTofu (epic)",
+    "description": "Support OpenTofu (epic). Requested by 283+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current atlantis deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your atlantis version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support OpenTofu (epic)",
+        "description": "A workaround for users that want to go down the opentofu path before support is official could do the following.

1. Set [`--tf-download=false`](https://www.runatlantis.io/docs/server-configuration.html#tf-download) to avoid downloading terraform versions
2. Use a custom container to [download a
```yaml
initConfig:
  enabled: true
  image: alpine:latest
  imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  # sharedDir is set as env var INIT_SHARED_DIR
  sharedDir: /plugins
  workDir: /tmp
  sizeLimit: 250Mi
  # example of how the script can be configured to install tools/providers required by the atlantis pod
  script: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eoux pipefail

    # terragrunt
    TG_VERSION="0.55.10"
    TG_SHA256_SUM="1ad609399352348a41bb5ea96fdff5c7a18ac223742f60603a557a54fc8c6cff"
    TG_FILE="${INIT_SHARED_DIR}/terragrunt"
    wget https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt/releases/download/v${TG_VERSION}/te
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade atlantis to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade atlantis:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade atlantis atlantis/atlantis --namespace atlantis
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis
helm list -n atlantis
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support OpenTofu (epic)" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "A workaround for users that want to go down the opentofu path before support is official could do the following.

1. Set [`--tf-download=false`](https://www.runatlantis.io/docs/server-configuration.html#tf-download) to avoid downloading terraform versions
2. Use a custom container to [download a opentofu release](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/releases) as `/usr/bin/opentofu_<version>`
3.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "initConfig:
  enabled: true
  image: alpine:latest
  imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  # sharedDir is set as env var INIT_SHARED_DIR
  sharedDir: /plugins
  workDir: /tmp
  sizeLimit: 250Mi
  # example of how the script can be configured to install tools/providers required by the atlantis pod
  script: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eoux pipefail

    # terragrunt
    TG_VERSION="0.55.10"
    TG_SHA256_SUM="1ad609399352348a41bb5ea96fdff5c7a18ac223742f60603a557a54fc8c6cff"
    TG_FILE="${INIT_SHARED_DIR}/terragrunt"
    wget https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt/releases/download/v${TG_VERSION}/terragrunt_linux_amd64 -O "${TG_FILE}"
    echo "${TG_SHA256_SUM} ${TG_FILE}" | sha256sum -c
    chmod 755 "${TG_FILE}"
    terragrunt -v

    # OpenTofu
    TF_VERSION="1.6.2"
    TF_FILE="${INIT_SHARE",
+        "environment: 
  ATLANTIS_TF_DOWNLOAD: false
  TERRAGRUNT_TFPATH: /plugins/tofu",
+        "repoConfig: |
  ---
  repos:
  - id: /.*/
    apply_requirements: [approved, mergeable]
    allow_custom_workflows: true
    allowed_overrides: [workflow, apply_requirements, delete_source_branch_on_merge]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/3741",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis"
+    },
+    "reactions": 283,
+    "comments": 26,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:29:21.223Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
